name: Argentina
style_of_play: Possession-heavy with short combinations through midfield and aggressive pressing after losing possession.
tactical_summary: Build through the half-spaces with inverted wingers cutting inside; fullbacks provide width when the block is compact. Midfield trio controls tempo and recycles possession to create overloads around the box.
why_it_matters: Argentina's midfield control can slow down transition-heavy teams and create sustained pressure, forcing opponents to defend deep for long stretches.
injury_news: Placeholder — squad fitness updates will be added when live data is integrated.
